text:
Elon Reeve Musk (/ˈiːlɒn/ EE-lon; born June 28, 1971) is a businessman and entrepreneur known for his leadership of Tesla, SpaceX, X, and xAI. Musk has been the wealthiest person in the world since 2025; as of April 2026, Forbes estimates his net worth to be US$809 billion.

Born into a wealthy family in Pretoria, South Africa, Musk emigrated in 1989 to Canada; he has Canadian citizenship since his mother was born there. He received bachelor's degrees in 1997 from the University of Pennsylvania before moving to California to pursue business ventures. In 1995, Musk co-founded the software company Zip2. Following its sale in 1999, he co-founded X.com, an online payment company that later merged to form PayPal, which was acquired by eBay in 2002. Musk also became an American citizen in 2002.
Summary: Elon Reeve Musk has been the wealthiest person in the world since 2025 . Forbes estimates his net worth to be US$809 billion . Musk emigrated to Canada in 1989 and has Canadian citizenship since his mother was born there .

text: Cloud computing has revolutionized the way organizations manage and store data. Instead of relying on local servers, businesses can now use cloud platforms to access scalable and cost-effective resources. This has enabled startups and large enterprises alike to innovate faster and reduce infrastructure costs. Despite its benefits, cloud computing also introduces concerns related to security, compliance, and vendor lock-in.
Summary: Cloud computing has revolutionized the way organizations manage and store data . This has enabled startups and large enterprises to innovate faster and reduce infrastructure costs . Despite its benefits, cloud computing also introduces concerns related to security, compliance, and vendor lock-in .
